scripts.publish:bridge: dotnet publish apps/win-bridge/win-bridge.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:DebugType=None -p:DebugSymbols=false -o artifacts/win-bridge/win-x64
scripts.package:desktop:dir: npm run build:vendor && npm run build:contracts && npm run publish:bridge && corepack pnpm --filter @latex-suite/desktop package:dir
scripts.dist:desktop:win: npm run build:vendor && npm run build:contracts && npm run publish:bridge && corepack pnpm --filter @latex-suite/desktop dist:win
scripts.build: npm run build:vendor && npm run build:contracts && npm run build:desktop && npm run build:dotnet
scripts.test: npm run test:repo && npm run version:check && npm run test:desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:vendor && corepack pnpm --filter @latex-suite/desktop dev
